action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 5000000 AND budget <= 999999999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

action_logs.rule_description: Sets the minimum supplier quotes to 1 for budgets between 0 and 24,999.99 CHF.

action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 0 AND budget <= 24999.99 AND currency = "CHF"

flags.description: 4 suppliers are ranked within 0.0170 points of each other (threshold: 0.05). The ranking adds little decision value — any quote may be equivalent.
The preferred-supplier 10% bonus elevated 'Azure Enterprise' from rank 0.9556 to 1.0000, above the next-ranked supplier at 0.9948. Without the bonus this supplier would not have ranked #1.
